changelog: Auto-retry all download failures with backoff
Arweave ar:// URL support for downloads and metadata
Accurate IPFS pin counting (media files only)
WiFi scan shows all networks (sudo rescan fix)
Kiosk: View Art button auto-shows when art is downloaded
Kiosk: gallery redirects to add.html on computer when no art
Slideshow presets use server-side whitelist (no leaked files)
WiFi power save disabled by default (prevents CPU spikes)
Kiosk waits for API before checking art status on boot
Version-aware update system with GitHub integration
